description: Tracked category doctrine for public site taxonomy migration passes.

blog.definition: Prose, reflection, essays, and human notes.
must_not_contain: interactive browser artifacts as primary content
repo-backed reusable software as primary content

toy.definition: Interactive browser artifact, playable demo, or small live experiment.

tool.definition: Repo-backed reusable software, public extraction, versioned library, or harness.

animation.definition: Literal animation showcase, old animation links, credits-adjacent animation portfolio material, and Chew/Gum series work.
must_not_contain: software doodad filed as finished animation
toy whose primary value is interaction rather than animation showcase

about.definition: Identity, credits, proof trail, external profile resolution, and name-collision handling.

lab.definition: Umbrella and methodology lane. Not a junk drawer for unclassified artifacts.

migration_checks: Old URL has a redirect, pointer, or noindex/stub plan.
Index pages update with the move.
Sitemap and llms.txt impact is named.
Toy index contains interactive artifacts only.
Tool index contains repo-backed artifacts only.
